title: Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX (radeonsi, navi31, LLVM 18.1.8, DRM 3.57, 6.9.9-1-default)
notes:
Once I reach the in-game Microsoft login screen, the following error message pops up in a separate window:
#  
```
Assertion Failed!
Program:
Z:\home\user\.local\share\Steam\steamapps\common\Limitless\FlightSimulator2024.exe
File: .../src-wine/dlls/winevulkan/loader_thunks.c
Line: 2971
Expression: "!status && "vkCreateGraphicsPipelines""
Press OK to exit the program, or Cancel to start the Wine debugger.
```
#  
Pressing either option on the error window closes the game, but since the game is still responsive after the error window pops up, I can ignore it and continue the login process, although I'm not able to see the location of my cursor. Once I successfully login, the game freezes completely. Restarting the game will still open the separate error window, but the login screen is skipped and I proceed to an initial setup loading screen. The progress bar is extremely slow, giving the impression that it's stuck, and the accompanying cinematic also freezes at some point, but if I continue to let the game run, the progress bar will very slowly fill up. After approximately 20 minutes of waiting, the "loading language" & "activating packages" portions of the initial setup are complete, and at this point a second, identical error message pops up. The progress bar animation fully freezes, remaining at 51% on "loading world data". The music is still playing, but visually the game is completely unresponsive.
title: Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024

I have tried multiple proton versions and vulkan dlls.

Does not work

notes:
Updating a prior report now 24 hours later. Did a few updates to drivers and core system libraries but still the error related to "vkCreateGraphicsPipelines" occurs. 

It appears I can get as far as "Loading Weather" and I can get anywhere between 53-63% and then the error box appears twice. The first time the box appears it's "non-fatal" and can be ignored. The second box is fatal and crashes the game where I have to completely force quit the game. 

I'm not able to progress any further or make it to avatar creation. I cannot even see the first menu of the game outside of the intial startup launch portion. Also noticed at least a minor improvement is the intro video that plays during this load up plays this time where yesterday it was completely black.

title: Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024

notes:
I had a problem with Shader Model 4.7 not being supported, I got around it by adding 

```
VKD3D_CONFIG="enable_experimental_features"
``` 

to my launch options, then the game opened.

The main menu seem to miss textures. However I'm able to navigate fine, also swapping from fullscreen to windowed and vice versa works fine.


When I try to start a flight session, the game hangs, looking at the logs I get alot of 
```
vkd3d-proton:d3d12_pipeline_state_create_pipeline_variant: Failed to create Vulkan graphics pipeline, vr -13
```
not completly sure it's related to the hang.


I looked in the market place menu of the game, looks like the content is not installed locally, but rather set to be streamed. The installation is only taking 17 GiB, I would expect it to be significantly larger. I think the content manager is not able to allocate space to install content locally. Seems like there is something wrong, also when I select an airport on the map, there seem to be missing textures for the geography.
title: Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024
